description_long: This is a whimsical balloon shaped to resemble a cartoon mouse head, with two large black spherical ears and a white spherical face featuring a printed mouse face graphic. The balloon is glossy and smooth, with a shiny surface that reflects light. A thin red string is attached to the bottom center, likely for holding or tethering the balloon. The face of the mouse is detailed with black outlines for the eyes, nose, and mouth, giving it a playful and recognizable appearance. The back of the balloon is plain black, with no additional graphics or features. The overall construction suggests it is filled with air or helium, making it lightweight and buoyant.
description: A glossy, cartoon mouse-shaped balloon with black ears, a white face featuring a printed mouse graphic, and a red string attached at the bottom.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black spherical ears and the protruding white mouse face with a visible nose.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full mouse face graphic, both black ears, and the red string hanging down.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the black ears and the side profile of the mouse face, with the nose visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing only the three black spheres (ears and head) and the red string, with no graphics visible.
